title: Review
description: Schema for review documents in the video-game-305 Firestore database. Each document represents one review written by a user for a specific game.

game_name.description: The name of the game being reviewed

user_id.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who wrote the review

user_ref.description: Firestore document reference path pointing to the reviewer's document in the users collection (e.g. users/uid)
